title: EU pushes back on US ‘overcapacity’ probe amid trade deal uncertainty
summary_full: "The sources of such overcapacity are well-identified, and they do not lie in Europe,” Brussels said – in a thinly veiled reference to China
summary_public: "The sources of such overcapacity are well-identified, and they do not lie in Europe,” Brussels said – in a thinly veiled reference to China
